tagline: « Track me before you eat me »
daily_checkin_desc: Get 10 free coins just for opening the app today.
empty_state_msg:
No expenses recorded yet!
Your money is safe for now.
no_forecast: No forecast available due to lack of expenses.
forecast_warning: At your current spending rate ({} {}/day), your balance will run out on: {} (after {} days).
forecast_empty: Your balance has already run out! Please reduce spending or record new income.
calendar_legend: Current Month Days (Green = No Spend | Red = Spent)
wrapped_slide0_desc: You recorded transactions and tracked your money with great precision!
wrapped_slide1_desc: The category you spent the most on this year is:
wrapped_slide2_desc: The biggest expense transaction you recorded was:
shop_tip: Save more.. check in daily.. earn more coins! 😉
theme_gold_desc: A glowing golden look giving the app a royal touch of wealth!
theme_autumn_desc: An autumn look with warm colors and eyes-friendly orange patterns.
theme_rare_icons_desc: Additional rare and animated icons to categorize your transactions.
buy_fail: Not enough coins balance to complete the purchase! 🥺
pet_comment_normal: We are stable so far.. don't forget to record every transaction! 😉
pet_comment_fed: Wow artist.. your food is golden! My tummy thanks you! 🥰
pet_comment_overrun: Oh dear! The budget flew away, champion! 😢💸
pet_comment_warning: Look.. we are entering a danger zone, fasten your seatbelt! 😟
pet_comment_negative: Below Zero? 🥶 We need a financial miracle or immediate cost-cutting!
pet_comment_gold: Wonderful! A penny saved is a penny earned! 👑🏆
feed_success_msg: 🐷: Yum! That tastes great, thank you! 🥰 (+ love)
feed_fail_msg: You do not have enough coins! 🥺 (Requires 10 coins)
onboarding_goal_title: What is your primary financial goal?
challenge_completed_msg: Congratulations! You completed the saving challenge! 🥳
premium_body_active: You are a golden member now! All ads disabled for life! 🏆
premium_body_inactive: Get rid of interstitial ads and banners forever with one touch.
premium_upgrade_alert: Get a completely ad-free experience to support the app in one touch!
tip_stable: You are in a stable financial status. Try saving 20% of your current balance to reach your goals faster!
tip_negative: Negative balance! It is recommended to review category budgets and stop non-essential expenses immediately.
no_spend_tip_body: The real competition is breaking your savings record! Keep the green squares 🟢 for as long as possible to build unbreakable financial habits 😉.
premium_success_msg: Congratulations! Golden Version activated and ads removed successfully! 🏆
shop_motivation: Save more.. check in daily.. collect more coins! 😉
onboarding_welcome_sub: We will ask you 3 quick questions to set up the app for you.
onboarding_goal1_desc: Reduce excessive spending and save for the future.
onboarding_goal2_desc: Track where your money goes every month in detail.
onboarding_goal3_desc: Set a maximum spending limit to avoid debt.
receipt_comment: 💰 « Saved... don't worry, keeping an eye on it! 😉 »
no_budgets_msg:
No budgets set yet.
Set limits on your daily spending to control your expenses!
budget_exceeded_warning: ⚠️ You exceeded the limit for this category!
budget_warning_80: ⚠️ Approaching the limit for this category (over 80%)
no_transactions_today: No transactions recorded for this day.
title_empty_error: Please enter a title for the transaction
quick_add_sheet_subtitle: Type e.g.: "120 coffee", "350 fuel", or "6000 salary"
personality_balanced_desc: You spend wisely and balance your expenses and savings.
personality_saver_desc: You are very careful with spending and save a major part of your income.
personality_risktaker_desc: You spend everything in your pocket! Precaution is advised.
personality_foodlover_desc: Your stomach commands your wallet! Most of your money goes to delicious meals.
challenge_success_snackbar: 🎉 Congrats! You passed the challenge and saved money!
challenge_1_desc: Avoid buying any coffee or outside drinks for 7 days to save money.
challenge_2_desc: Try not to exceed 500 units of shopping expenses this week.
challenge_3_desc: Spend a whole day without recording any expenses at all.
onboarding_language_title: Choose App Language / اختر لغة التطبيق
onboarding_welcome_sub_4: We will ask you 4 quick questions to customize the app.
